name: Encharge (Actions)
description: Encharge is a marketing automation platform that enables B2B SaaS companies to automate their marketing processes to increase customer engagement, retention, and revenue.

apiKey.description: Encharge.io API Key. This can be found on your [Account page](https://app.encharge.io/settings/api-keys).
apiKey.label: API Key

actions.name: Alias User
actions.description: Change the User ID of an user.

fields.label: User ID
fields.description: The new User ID to associate with the user in Encharge.

userId.title: User ID
userId.description: The new User ID to associate with the user in Encharge.

fields.label: Previous User ID
fields.description: The previous User ID associated with the user in Encharge.

previousUserId.title: Previous User ID
previousUserId.description: The previous User ID associated with the user in Encharge.

fields.label: Timestamp
fields.description: The timestamp of the event

fields.label: MessageId
fields.description: The Segment messageId

actions.name: Create or Update Object
actions.description: Create or Update a Custom Object (including Companies) in Encharge. If an email or a user ID is provided, an Encharge user will be associated with the object. A new user will be created if the email or user ID does not exist in Encharge.

fields.label: Object Type
fields.description: The type of Encharge object to create or update.

objectType.title: Object Type
objectType.description: The type of Encharge object to create or update.

fields.label: External Object ID
fields.description: An ID from your app/database that is used to uniquely identify the object in Encharge.

externalId.title: External Object ID
externalId.description: An ID from your app/database that is used to uniquely identify the object in Encharge.

fields.label: Object ID
fields.description: The Encharge ID of the object. Usually, you want to omit this and use External ID.

id.title: Object ID
id.description: The Encharge ID of the object. Usually, you want to omit this and use External ID.

fields.label: Object Fields
fields.description: Data for the object fields in Encharge. Any unexisting fields will be ignored.

objectData.title: Object Fields
objectData.description: Data for the object fields in Encharge. Any unexisting fields will be ignored.

fields.label: User ID
fields.description: The User ID of the user to associate with the object. If no email or user ID is provided, no user will be created and associated.

userId.title: User ID
userId.description: The User ID of the user to associate with the object. If no email or user ID is provided, no user will be created and associated.

fields.label: Email
fields.description: The email of the user to associate with the object. If no email or user ID is provided, no user will be created and associated.

email.title: Email
email.description: The email of the user to associate with the object. If no email or user ID is provided, no user will be created and associated.

actions.name: Identify User
actions.description: Identify a user in Encharge. This will create a new user if the user does not exist in Encharge.

fields.label: User Fields
fields.description: Fields to associate with the user in Encharge. Any unexisting fields will be automatically created in Encharge.

user.title: User Fields
user.description: Fields to associate with the user in Encharge. Any unexisting fields will be automatically created in Encharge.

fields.label: Email
fields.description: The email address of the user.

email.title: Email
email.description: The email address of the user.

fields.label: Type
fields.description: The type of event.

fields.label: Anonymous ID
fields.description: An anonymous identifier for this user.

segmentAnonymousId.title: Anonymous ID
segmentAnonymousId.description: An anonymous identifier for this user.

fields.label: User ID
fields.description: The User ID associated with the user in Encharge.

userId.title: User ID
userId.description: The User ID associated with the user in Encharge.

fields.label: Group ID
fields.description: An ID associating the event with a group.

groupId.title: Group ID
groupId.description: An ID associating the event with a group.

fields.label: Timestamp
fields.description: The timestamp of the event

fields.label: MessageId
fields.description: The Segment messageId

fields.label: IP Address
fields.description: The IP address of the user.

ip.title: IP Address
ip.description: The IP address of the user.

fields.label: User Agent
fields.description: The user agent of the user. Used to determine the device, browser and operating system.

userAgent.title: User Agent
userAgent.description: The user agent of the user. Used to determine the device, browser and operating system.

fields.label: Campaign
fields.description: UTM campaign information.

fields.label: Page
fields.description: Information about the page where the event occurred.

page.title: Page
page.description: Information about the page where the event occurred.

url.title: URL
url.description: The URL of the page where the event occurred.

title.title: Title
title.description: The title of the page where the event occurred.

referrer.title: Referrer
referrer.description: The referrer of the page where the event occurred.

path.title: Path
path.description: The path of the page where the event occurred.

search.title: Search
search.description: The search query of the page where the event occurred.

fields.label: Location
fields.description: Information about the location of the user.

location.title: Location
location.description: Information about the location of the user.

actions.description: Add a tag to a user in Encharge.

actions.name: Track Event
actions.description: Track an event in Encharge for a known or anonymous person.

fields.label: Event Name
fields.description: The name of the event.

fields.label: Event Properties
fields.description: The properties of the event.

fields.label: User Fields
fields.description: Any default or custom field of the user. On the left-hand side, input the API name of the field as seen in your Encharge account. On the right-hand side, map the Segment field that contains the value. Any properties that don't exist will be created automatically. See more information in [Encharge's documentation](https://help.encharge.io/article/206-create-and-manage-custom-fields).

userFields.title: User Fields
userFields.description: Any default or custom field of the user. On the left-hand side, input the API name of the field as seen in your Encharge account. On the right-hand side, map the Segment field that contains the value. Any properties that don't exist will be created automatically. See more information in [Encharge's documentation](https://help.encharge.io/article/206-create-and-manage-custom-fields).

On the right-hand side, map the Segment field that contains the value. Any properties that don't exist will be created automatically. See more information in [Encharge's documentation](https://help.encharge.io/article/206-create-and-manage-custom-fields).
